skills: Frontend Development (React, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS)
profile.name: MK Khichi

ranked_matches:
Here’s the ranked list of the **TOP 10 jobs** from **BEST to WORST match** for your candidate, based on skill overlap, role relevance, and experience level (junior-friendly):

---

### **1. AI Agent Engineer (Senior)** at **Funavry Technologies**
   **Match Score: 90/100**
   **Why:** Perfect alignment with **RAG, LangChain, LLM/AI agent development**, and **frontend (React/Tailwind)**—core for AI agents. Python, API integration, and SDLC further strengthen the fit.
   **Missing:** Senior-level experience (though junior candidates with strong AI projects can still apply).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-agent-engineer-senior-at-funavry-technologies-4431574922)

---

### **2. AI Software Engineers (2 Positions)** at **TechWalks**
   **Match Score: 88/100**
   **Why:** **AI/ML, RAG, LangChain, and LLM development** are explicitly mentioned in the job, with Python and API integration as key requirements. Frontend (React/Tailwind) is a bonus for full-stack AI roles.
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of AI agents (though RAG/LangChain implies similar work).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-software-engineers-2-positions-at-techwalks-4431957995)

---

### **3. AI Platform Engineer** at **Nayatel** *(Duplicate entries consolidated)*
   **Match Score: 85/100**
   **Why:** **Python, RAG, LangChain, LLM/ML, and AI agent development** are directly relevant for building AI platforms. API integration and SDLC are also critical.
   **Missing:** Less emphasis on frontend (React/Tailwind), though backend-heavy AI platforms may not always require it.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-platform-engineer-at-nayatel-4431926678)

---

### **4. Python Developer** at **Solution of Technologies**
   **Match Score: 65/100**
   **Why:** While the title is generic, your **AI/ML (RAG, LangChain, LLM), Python, and API integration** skills make this a strong fit for an **AI-focused Python role**.
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of AI agents, RAG, or LangChain in the job description (likely implied).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/python-developer-at-solution-of-technologies-4435535489)

---

### **5. Entry-Level Software Developer (AI Focus)** at **Recruit AI**
   **Match Score: 65/100**
   **Why:** Despite being labeled "Entry-Level," the **AI/ML (RAG, LangChain, LLM), React, and debugging** skills align well with junior AI roles.
   **Missing:** No explicit mention of AI agents or platform engineering (more general software dev).
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/entry-level-software-developer-tj-1857341-at-recruit-ai-4435108400)

---

### **6. Senior Backend Engineer** at **Adroid IT Solutions**
   **Match Score: 60/100**
   **Why:** Your **Python, API integration, and debugging** skills fit backend roles, but the **lack of AI/ML focus** (only backend tech) makes this a weaker match.
   **Missing:** No RAG, LangChain, or LLM experience mentioned in the job.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/senior-backend-engineer-at-adroid-it-solutions-4432349560)

---

### **7-10. Duplicate AI Platform Engineer Roles at Nayatel**
   **Match Score: 75/100 (Repeated Entries)**
   **Why:** Same as **#3**—strong AI/ML fit but **redundant listings**.
   **Missing:** No unique differentiation from other Nayatel roles.
   **Apply:** [LinkedIn](https://pk.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-platform-engineer-at-nayatel-4431926678) *(Same as #3)*

---

### **Final Recommendations:**
1. **Top 3 jobs (#1, #2, #3)** are **ideal**—apply with a **focus on AI agent/RAG/LangChain projects** in your resume.
2. **#4 (Python Developer)** is a **safe fallback** if AI-specific roles are competitive.
3. **Avoid #6 (Backend Engineer)** unless you can pivot to an AI role internally.
4. **Ignore duplicates (#7-10)**—focus on unique listings.

**Pro Tip:** For **junior roles**, highlight **projects** (e.g., "Built an RAG-based chatbot with LangChain") to compensate for experience gaps. Good luck! 🚀
